name: vibe-access
description: Give agents pipelines into your app. Scans your routes and auth model, maps every callable surface into a schema-versioned agent-access.json manifest with dev and prod-safe tiers, scaffolds the affordances your app is missing (seed, reset, read-state, capture, discovery) behind hard env gates, and proves the layer with a cold-agent verify that exercises every affordance before anything counts as done. seed/reset/capture can never be tagged prod-safe — a refusal, not a warning. Visualize renders the surface an agent actually sees as a single self-contained HTML page (manifest or a live MCP tools/list payload), and describe grades the descriptions an agent has to choose from — tool count is never graded. Deep on Firebase Cloud Functions (hosting-rewrite route detection, ID-token auth mapping) and Streamlit (mode-registry inventory, dev-gated FastAPI sidecar scaffold — Streamlit has no routes, so the sidecar IS the callable surface), with a real adapter seam that reports an honest not-yet-implemented for the rest. The manifest is the embryo of your eventual MCP server. Validated against WeSeeYouAtTheMovies and PriceScout.
